golden_hour_warm.lightingBrief: Warm directional light from a low angle late afternoon. Long soft shadows on pool deck. Water reflects deep blue-teal. Sky is clear with warm golden tones. Lush landscaping surrounds a sparkling residential pool.
golden_hour_warm.skyDescriptor: Clear sky with warm sunset tones near horizon
golden_hour_warm.shadowDescriptor: Long, soft shadows across the pool deck

bright_midday_clean.lightingBrief: Bright overhead midday sun. Water is crystal clear blue. Pool deck is bright white or beige. High contrast, clean, resort-quality feel. No shadows on the water surface.

overcast_calm.lightingBrief: Soft overcast light, even exposure across the entire scene. Water appears calm and clean. No harsh highlights or shadows. Professional and trustworthy mood.

dramatic_dusk.lightingBrief: Deep blue dusk sky above a lit residential pool. Pool lighting glows from within the water. Exterior lighting illuminates deck and landscaping. Premium luxury feel.
dramatic_dusk.skyDescriptor: Deep navy to cobalt blue sky just after sunset
dramatic_dusk.shadowDescriptor: Pool lighting creates warm glow on deck

dawn_soft_optimistic.lightingBrief: Soft early morning light with a gentle warm glow on the horizon. Pool surface is still and reflective. Fresh start feel. Quiet residential setting.
dawn_soft_optimistic.skyDescriptor: Soft pink and blue dawn sky
dawn_soft_optimistic.shadowDescriptor: Very long, very soft morning shadows
